items.name: pint's card
items.description: Pint's card with its full name written: Pint A.R. (Pint Astra Roosevelt).

items.name: chil's card
items.description: Chil's card with its full name written: Chil L.L. (Chil Luft Lambert).

items.name: hall key
items.description: The key to open the access to the grand hall rooftop.

items.name: diving suit
items.description: A heavy diving suit with an oxygen tank.

items.name: large mark photo
items.description: A large mark, seems like a big item has been placed here before. You can take large mark photo to save it to inventory.

items.name: footsteps photo
items.description: Some footsteps, surprisingly it is the same size as yours although you do not remember setting your foot here. You can take footsteps photo to save it to inventory.

items.name: ash
items.description: A pile of ash. Looks like something is burnt here before.

items.name: cigarette
items.description: Cigarette. You wonder why May brings it with her.
items.message: Nothing happens. The wet cigarette can't be lighted.

items.name: rope
items.description: A rope with a burnt end.

items.name: chair
items.description: A chair with some cigarette butts on the chair arms.

items.name: spotlight
items.description: A spotlight that is as bright as sunlight. But, now it continuously flickers due to low power.
items.message: Nothing happens. The lamp's battery seems running low.

items.name: mirror
items.description: A broken concave mirror with intact mirror frame.

items.name: fall photo
items.description: Some marks indicating that a person hugging a big item falls here. You can take fall photo to save it to inventory.

items.name: footsteps photo 2
items.description: Some other running footsteps, surprisingly it is the same size as yours although you do not remember setting your foot here. You can take footsteps photo 2 to save it to inventory.

items.name: mist spray
items.description: A spray bottle contains some stimulant fine mist.
items.message: With a foul smell, the fine mist sprayed from the bottle successfully makes you more conscious.

items.name: gold key
items.description: A small gold key lying on the floor. You believe that's the key to Dr. Seegy's room.
items.message: The door creaked when you touch it.

items.name: mirror stand
items.description: This is the place where a large mirror should be placed.

items.name: warehouse key
items.description: The key to access the warehouse. It is found on top of Dr. Seegy's table.

items.name: scrambled paper
items.description: A scrambled paper with Dr.Seegy's handwriting: mirror-mirror_oh_iseegy#has^succeed. Probably a password of such.

items.name: chicken soup
items.description: A large bowl of stale chicken soup. The paper besides it suggests that the soup is cooked by you last night for everyone's supper.
items.message: The aroma of the soup makes you nauseous, so you decided to just take a little taste. You immediately regret it.

items.name: may's paper
items.description: A paper about optical reflection research. The research won a prestigious award.

items.name: chil's paper
items.description: A paper about optical reflection research. You notice that is very similar to May's groundbreaking research.

items.name: pint's draft
items.description: A draft about mirror materials. The research is still a work in progress.

items.name: lab key
items.description: The key to access the lab. Due to the estate's remote location, no one is afraid of lost keys although the key is placed in front of the lab.

items.name: lantern
items.description: A small light lantern. Maybe you can go to the dark west forest with this lantern.

items.name: stone
items.description: Two piles of stone. Strangely, the stones suggest that there were 2 earthquakes last night.
